\tzpentry{ID3397}{Photon Quantum Hamiltonian}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3397 introduces Photon Quantum Hamiltonian as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
$$ \mathcal{H}_{photon} = \int d^3r \, \epsilon_0 \mathbf{E} \cdot \mathbf{B}_{photon} = \sum_k \hbar \omega_k (n_{L,k} - n_{R,k}) $$
